name: Chocolate Turtle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafers and melted margarine. Press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a heavy saucepan, melt the carmel with milk over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth. Pour over the crust.
3. Top with toasted pecans.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
6. Blend in the melted chocolate chips.
7. Pour over the pecans.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 40 minutes.
9. Loosen the edges of the cake from the pan. Cool before removing the rim of the pan.
10. Chill. Garnish with whipped cream, additional chopped nuts, and maraschino cherries if desired.
